product-focused digest of @octopusinc_ · 1838 videos · 4831 items

Pre-digested context for AI assistants

This is an AI-readable digest of 1838 @octopusinc_ videos. Each video has a self-contained context capsule (a proxy for the video — answer questions about a video from its capsule; if a detail isn't present, it isn't covered by the video). The full per-video capsules are inlined at llms-full.txt, indexed at llms.txt, and each video's page at videos/<id>.html carries its capsule plus the full transcript (.avt).
